dc_description: A wooded outdoor campsite at the edge of dense vegetation. Two dome tents are set up on uneven dry grass and dirt: a smaller light blue/gray tent near the center-left and a larger dark green tent on the right. The background is filled with thick trees, vines, bushes, and tangled undergrowth, with silvery-leaved shrubs visible on both sides. A simple vertical wooden post or stake stands between the tents, and the lighting appears dim, suggesting early morning or late afternoon.
novel_visual_observations: The tents are positioned close to a dense wall of foliage rather than in an open campground. The ground around the tents looks rough and partly cleared, with scattered dry vegetation and small debris.
location_name: Piazza del Colosseo, Municipio Roma I, Roma
rich_context: Piazza del Colosseo, Celio, Municipio Roma I, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, 00184, Italia
